name: Spaghetti Al Zenzaro
recipeIngredient: 1 piece fresh ginger (unpeeled, about 2 inches long, 3/4 inch wide), sliced into 4 to 5 thin slices
¼ to ½ teaspoon red pepper flakes
2 tbsp fresh basil leaves (thinly sliced or coarsely chopped)
2 tbsp fresh mint leaves (thinly sliced or coarsely chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the spaghetti until it is al dente.
2. In a separate pan, heat the garlic, ginger slices, and red pepper flakes in olive oil. Cook until the garlic turns golden around the edges but does not brown.
3. Drain the cooked spaghetti and remove the ginger slices.
4. Toss the spaghetti with the garlic/ginger/red pepper mixture, seasoning to taste with salt.
5. Add basil and mint leaves, then serve immediately.
